text.title: Annual Roadmap vs Quarterly OKR Stitch Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

schema.code: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "$id": "https://faion.net/schemas/annual-roadmap-vs-quarterly-okr-stitch.json", "title": "Annual Roadmap vs Quarterly OKR Stitch", "type": "object", "required": [ "stitch_id", "owner", "last_touched", "annual_bets", "quarterly_okrs", "traceability_matrix", "off_pace_flags", "review_cadence" ], "properties": { "stitch_id": {}, "owner": {}, "last_touched": {}, "annual_bets": {}, "quarterly_okrs": {}, "traceability_matrix": {}, "off_pace_flags": {}, "review_cadence": {} }, "additionalProperties": true }

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `annual-roadmap-vs-quarterly-okr-stitch`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: off_pace status not in {on-pace, lagging, off-pace}
